FOR DEFENDANTS ROBERT LYON AND DENISE BUZBUZIAN-LYON -- DEFENDANTS ROBERT LYON AND DENISE BUZBUZIAN-LYON'S MOTION TO CONTINUE JURY TRIAL IS GRANTED. THE TRIAL DATE OF 4/6/20 IS CONTINUED TO 10/13/20 IN DEPT. 206 AT 9:30 AM. ALL TRIAL-RELATED DATES, INCLUDING FACT AND EXPERT DISCOVERY, SHALL BE CALCULATED BASED UPON THE NEW TRIAL DATE, AS REFLECTED ON THE ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. MOVING PARTY ORDERED TO PAY $60.00 MOTION FILING FEE AT THE CLERK'S OFFICE FOR FAILURE TO PROVIDE COURTESY COPIES OF THIS SAID MOTION PURSUANT TO LOCAL RULE 2.7(B). JUDGE: GARRETT L.
